skills.description: Implement semantic vector search for construction data. Build AI-powered search using embeddings and vector databases (Qdrant, ChromaDB) for intelligent querying of specifications, standards, and project documents.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: cost-prediction
skills.description: Predict construction project costs using Machine Learning. Use Linear Regression, K-Nearest Neighbors, and Random Forest models on historical project data. Train, evaluate, and deploy cost prediction models.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: duration-prediction
skills.description: Predict project duration using k-NN and regression. Estimate timeline based on similar historical projects.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: ml-model-builder
skills.description: Build ML models for construction predictions. Train and evaluate custom models for cost, duration, and risk prediction.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: ml-model-retrainer
skills.description: Automated pipeline for retraining ML models with new construction data. Monitor model drift, trigger retraining, and validate model performance.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: schedule-forecaster
skills.description: Predict project completion dates using ML models. Forecast schedule delays based on current progress, historical patterns, and risk factors.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: digital-maturity-assessment
skills.description: Assess organization's digital transformation readiness. Evaluate data culture, technology adoption, and process maturity.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: llm-document-extraction
skills.description: Extract structured data from construction documents using LLMs. Process RFIs, submittals, contracts, specifications. Convert unstructured PDFs to structured JSON/Excel.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: multi-agent-estimation
skills.description: Build multi-agent AI systems for construction estimation. Use CrewAI/LangGraph to orchestrate specialized agents: QTO agent, pricing agent, validation agent. Automate complex estimation workflows.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: n8n-cost-estimation
skills.description: Build n8n pipeline for automated cost estimation from Revit/IFC using DDC CWICR database and LLM classification.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: n8n-daily-report
skills.description: Automate daily construction report generation using n8n workflow automation.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: n8n-photo-report
skills.description: Automate construction photo report generation using n8n with AI-powered image analysis.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: n8n-project-management
skills.description: Build a complete project management system with Telegram bot, task distribution, and photo reports using n8n. Based on DDC Project Management repository.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: n8n-pto-pipeline
skills.description: Create n8n workflow for daily task assignment from PTO engineer to foreman via Telegram bot with status reporting.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: telegram-field-bot
skills.description: Build Telegram bots for construction field workers. Real-time reporting, photo uploads, task assignments, progress tracking. Integrate with n8n for automated workflows.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: voice-to-report
skills.description: Convert voice recordings to structured construction reports. Field workers speak, AI transcribes and formats. Supports daily reports, safety observations, progress updates.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: uberization-readiness
skills.description: Assess company readiness for construction industry uberization. Analyze data transparency, process automation, and competitive positioning against open data platforms.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: compliance-tracker
skills.description: Track regulatory compliance for construction projects. Monitor permits, certifications, inspections, and regulatory requirements with automated alerts and reporting.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: incident-reporting
skills.description: Construction safety incident reporting and analysis. Capture incidents, conduct investigations, track corrective actions, and analyze trends for prevention.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: quality-control-workflow
skills.description: Construction quality control workflow automation. Manage QC inspections, track defects, generate NCRs, and ensure specification compliance throughout the project.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: safety-inspection-checklist
skills.description: Digital safety inspection checklists for construction sites. Generate, conduct, and track safety inspections with automated reporting and compliance monitoring.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: toolbox-talk-generator
skills.description: Generate safety toolbox talks for construction crews. Create contextual safety briefings based on weather, work activities, and recent incidents. Support multiple languages.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: critical-path-analyzer
skills.description: Analyze construction schedule critical path. Identify critical activities, calculate float, simulate schedule impacts, and optimize project duration.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: delay-analysis
skills.description: Analyze construction schedule delays for claims and recovery. Perform time impact analysis, identify delay causes, calculate damages, and document for disputes.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: look-ahead-scheduler
skills.description: Generate rolling look-ahead schedules for construction. Create 2-week, 3-week, or 6-week look-aheads with constraint analysis and crew coordination.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: resource-allocation-optimizer
skills.description: Optimize construction resource allocation across activities. Level resources, resolve over-allocations, and balance workload while minimizing schedule impact.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: schedule-compression
skills.description: Compress construction schedules using crashing and fast-tracking techniques. Analyze cost-time tradeoffs and find optimal acceleration strategies.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: change-order-manager
skills.description: Manage construction change orders from request to approval. Track costs, schedule impacts, and maintain audit trail for dispute prevention.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: claims-documentation
skills.description: Document construction claims for disputes and recovery. Compile evidence, calculate damages, track notice requirements, and prepare claim packages.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: contract-clause-extractor
skills.description: Extract and analyze key clauses from construction contracts. Identify payment terms, change order procedures, dispute resolution, warranties, and risk allocation provisions.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: lien-waiver-tracker
skills.description: Track and manage construction lien waivers. Monitor conditional and unconditional waivers, ensure compliance before payments, and prevent lien exposure.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: input-validation
skills.description: Validate construction data inputs before processing: cost estimates, schedules, BIM data, field reports. Catch errors early with domain-specific rules.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: schema-validation
skills.description: JSON/data schema validation for construction data exchange: API payloads, file imports, BIM exports. Ensure data structure compliance before processing.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: docx-construction
skills.description: Word document generation for construction: contracts, proposals, reports, specifications, transmittals. Template-based with dynamic content insertion.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: email-construction
skills.description: Email generation for construction workflows: RFI responses, submittal transmittals, meeting notices, change order notifications. Professional templates with context-aware content.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: pdf-construction
skills.description: PDF processing for construction documents: RFIs, submittals, specifications, drawing packages. Extract data, merge packages, fill forms.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: pptx-construction
skills.description: PowerPoint generation for construction: project updates, stakeholder presentations, progress reports, bid presentations. Automated slide creation with charts and data.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: xlsx-construction
skills.description: Excel/spreadsheet processing for construction: estimates, schedules, tracking logs, quantity takeoffs. Formulas, formatting, analysis.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: budget-variance-analyzer
skills.description: Analyze construction budget variances. Compare estimated vs actual costs, identify trends, forecast final costs, and generate variance reports for cost control.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: cashflow-forecaster
skills.description: Forecast construction project cash flow. Project income and expenses, identify funding gaps, and optimize payment timing for improved financial management.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: payment-application-processor
skills.description: Process construction payment applications. Validate schedule of values, calculate retainage, track billing status, and generate G702/G703 forms.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: retention-tracker
skills.description: Track construction retainage/retention amounts. Monitor held amounts by subcontractor, track release conditions, and manage retainage billing.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: few-shot-examples
skills.description: Curated few-shot examples for construction AI tasks: classification, extraction, analysis. Domain-specific examples for improved LLM performance.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: prompt-templates
skills.description: Reusable prompt templates for construction AI tasks: cost estimation, schedule analysis, document processing, BIM queries. Structured prompts for consistent results.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: continuous-learning-construction
skills.description: Automatically extract patterns, best practices, and reusable knowledge from construction automation sessions to improve future performance.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: security-review-construction
skills.description: Security review checklist for construction software systems. Use when building integrations, APIs, data pipelines, or dashboards for construction projects.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: verification-loop-construction
skills.description: Comprehensive verification system for construction automation deliverables. Use after completing estimates, schedules, reports, or data processing tasks to ensure quality.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: as-built-documentation
skills.description: Automate as-built documentation and digital handover for construction. Compile project records, generate O&M manuals, create asset databases, and ensure complete project closeout.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: bim-visual-programming-automation
skills.description: Automate BIM workflows using visual programming and Python. Create parametric schedules, export data, batch modify elements, and integrate with external data sources.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: capacity-planning
skills.description: Plan organizational capacity for construction projects. Forecast resource needs, identify capacity gaps, and support strategic planning for project pursuit and staffing.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: change-order-analysis
skills.description: Analyze and predict construction change orders using ML. Classify change order types, predict costs and schedule impacts, identify patterns, and optimize approval workflows.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: clash-detection-analysis
skills.description: Detect and analyze geometric clashes between BIM elements. Identify hard clashes, soft clashes, and workflow conflicts using spatial analysis and rule-based detection.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: contractor-matching-ai
skills.description: AI-powered contractor matching and selection for construction projects. Analyze contractor capabilities, past performance, certifications, and project requirements to recommend optimal matches.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: defect-detection-ai
skills.description: AI-powered construction defect detection using computer vision. Identify cracks, spalling, corrosion, and other defects in concrete, steel, and building components from images and video.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: digital-twin-sync
skills.description: Synchronize construction digital twins with real-time data. Connect BIM models with IoT sensors, progress updates, and field data for live project visualization and monitoring.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: document-classification-nlp
skills.description: Automatically classify and extract information from construction documents using NLP. Categorize RFIs, submittals, change orders, specifications, and contracts.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: drone-site-survey
skills.description: Process drone survey data for construction sites. Generate orthomosaics, DEMs, point clouds, calculate volumes, track progress, and integrate with BIM models for comparison.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: energy-simulation
skills.description: Building energy simulation and analysis for construction. Calculate heating/cooling loads, evaluate envelope performance, optimize HVAC sizing, and ensure energy code compliance.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: enterprise-risk-aggregator
skills.description: Aggregate and analyze risks across construction project portfolio. Identify correlated risks, systemic exposures, and portfolio-level risk mitigation strategies.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: environmental-monitoring
skills.description: Monitor environmental conditions on construction sites. Track air quality, noise levels, vibration, dust, and weather to ensure compliance and worker safety.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: equipment-telematics
skills.description: Integrate and analyze telematics data from heavy construction equipment. Track location, utilization, fuel consumption, maintenance needs, and operator behavior.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: ifc-data-extraction
skills.description: Extract structured data from IFC (Industry Foundation Classes) files using IfcOpenShell. Parse BIM models, extract quantities, properties, spatial relationships, and export to various formats.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: labor-productivity-analytics
skills.description: Analyze construction labor productivity using data analytics. Track worker performance, identify inefficiencies, predict resource needs, and optimize crew allocation for maximum efficiency.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: material-tracking-iot
skills.description: IoT-based material tracking for construction sites. Monitor material delivery, storage conditions, usage, and inventory with sensors, RFID, GPS, and real-time dashboards.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: n8n-workflow-automation
skills.description: Build no-code/low-code automation workflows for construction using n8n. Automate data extraction, cost estimation, report generation, and system integrations without writing code.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: open-construction-estimate
skills.description: Access and utilize open construction pricing databases. Match BIM elements to standardized work items, calculate costs using public unit price databases with 55,000+ work items.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: permit-tracking-automation
skills.description: Automate construction permit tracking and management. Monitor application status, track renewal deadlines, manage document requirements, and integrate with municipal systems.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: portfolio-dashboard
skills.description: Multi-project portfolio analytics dashboard. Aggregate KPIs across projects, track portfolio health, compare performance, and support executive decision-making.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: prefab-optimization
skills.description: Optimize prefabrication and modular construction workflows. Plan module sequencing, factory scheduling, transportation logistics, and on-site assembly for maximum efficiency.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: progress-monitoring-cv
skills.description: Monitor construction progress using computer vision. Analyze site photos and drone imagery to track work completion, detect safety issues, and compare against BIM models.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: resource-pool-optimizer
skills.description: Optimize shared resource pools across multiple construction projects. Balance resource allocation, minimize conflicts, and maximize utilization across the portfolio.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: risk-assessment-ml
skills.description: Apply machine learning for construction project risk assessment. Predict schedule delays, cost overruns, and safety incidents using historical data and project characteristics.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: safety-compliance-checker
skills.description: Automated safety compliance verification for construction sites. Check PPE usage, zone access, working at heights regulations, and generate compliance reports using rule-based and ML approaches.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: sensor-data-aggregator
skills.description: Aggregate and analyze IoT sensor data from construction sites. Collect data from multiple sensor types, detect anomalies, and trigger alerts for safety and quality monitoring.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: site-logistics-optimization
skills.description: Optimize construction site logistics including material delivery scheduling, crane positioning, storage area allocation, and traffic flow using operations research and simulation.
skills.author: datadrivenconstruction

skills.name: weather-impact-analysis
skills.description: Analyze weather data impact on construction schedules. Predict weather delays, optimize work scheduling based on forecasts, and calculate weather-related risk factors for project planning.
